title: Claude GoldRush Skill
description: A ready-to-use Claude agent skill that gives any Claude-powered agent access to GoldRush APIs — fetch wallet data, token prices, NFTs, and transaction history from natural language prompts.
useCase: Enable a Claude agent to answer on-chain questions like 'What is the ETH balance of vitalik.eth?' or 'Show me the last 5 transactions for this address' using real GoldRush data.
endpoints: Multiple GoldRush endpoints wrapped as Claude tools

keyParams.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY: GoldRush API key set as environment variable
keyParams.chainName: EVM chain to query (passed by the agent at runtime)
keyParams.walletAddress: Target wallet address (extracted from user prompt by Claude)
